releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Add settings tab with icon and note-picker path toggle; bump to 0.0.2

- Add a settings tab with a lucide-link icon (shown in the settings
  sidebar on older Obsidian and beside results in 1.13 settings search)
  and a "Show file path in picker" toggle.
- Switch the README to community-directory install now that the plugin
  is in the directory.
- Remove em dashes from docs and update the project skill note.
- Bump to 0.0.2.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-link-as/compare/0.0.1...0.0.2

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Initial release.

Link selected or typed text to any note, keeping it as the display text. Inline links only — never writes to the target note's properties. Property Over File Name aware.
